simplesect.para: Pointer to "port" part, or NULL is none.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *addr_str, const char *def_port, const struct zsock_addrinfo *hints, struct zsock_addrinfo **res)
memberdef.name: net_getaddrinfo_addr_str

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to split addr[:port] string into address vs port components (or use default port number), and call getaddrinfo() on the result.

parameterdescription.para: Default port number to use if addr_str doesn't contain it
Result of getaddrinfo() (freeaddrinfo() should be called on it as usual.
